hero.headline_1: We don't want to sell you anything.
hero.headline_2: We want you to feel it.
hero.body: We are the most complete organization for Latino families and entrepreneurs in Upstate South Carolina. Loans, insurance, technology, education, health, and community — all in one place, backed by a team that knows you.

pillars.headline: An ecosystem built for you.
pillars.body: Each company was born to answer a real need in our community. Together, they form the most complete support system a Latino can find in South Carolina.

impact.headline: The numbers that matter.
impact.body: Every figure represents a family supported, a business launched, a life changed.

hu_band.text: Every loan we close, every policy we sell, every contract we sign — a portion goes directly to Hispanics United. You don't pay more. You don't make a donation. You simply choose with intention.

events.headline: Your place in the community.
events.body: Workshops, health events, networking and more — open to the entire community, at no cost.

shows.headline: Programs that inform, inspire, and elevate.

locations.headline: Six offices in Upstate SC.
locations.body: We serve you in your language, in person, at the nearest branch.
